recent_messages.text: Can you call Grandma later? She was asking if you are coming on Friday.
Yes, I’ll call her after lunch.

notes: The main topic is coordination with a grandmother, so this is family.

recent_messages.text: המורה אמרה שצריך להביא חולצה לבנה לטקס מחר.
בסדר, אני אכין לו בתיק.

notes: This is child/school family logistics, not work or home maintenance.

recent_messages.text: The dishwasher broke again, but the real problem is that Noam keeps loading it wrong.
I’ll talk to him tonight.

notes: Although a household appliance is mentioned, the main issue is family behavior and talking to Noam.

recent_messages.text: Can you update the numbers before the call?
Yes, I’m checking the latest version now.

notes: The message refers to updating numbers before a call, which is professional context.

recent_messages.text: אפשר שתעבור על ההצעה לפני שאני שולח אותה?
כן, שלח לי ואעבור על זה עכשיו.

notes: Reviewing a proposal before sending it is a work-related activity.

recent_messages.text: I know we said coffee, but I also wanted to ask about the open role on your team.
Sure, happy to tell you what they’re looking for.

notes: Although it starts socially, the main purpose is discussing an open role on a team.

recent_messages.text: The technician can come Thursday to check the AC.
Thursday works. Please ask him to come after 12.

notes: This is about apartment maintenance, so the correct label is home.

recent_messages.text: מחר בבוקר תהיה הפסקת מים בבניין בגלל תיקון בצנרת.
תודה על העדכון.

notes: Building water repairs are household/property logistics.

recent_messages.text: The kids are fine, but the bedroom window still does not close properly.
I’ll call the repair guy tomorrow.

notes: Even though Mom and kids are mentioned, the main issue is a home repair.

recent_messages.text: Want to go for a walk after dinner?
Yes, sounds good.

notes: This is a casual social plan with no family, work, or home context.

recent_messages.text: שלחתי לך את השיר שדיברתי עליו אתמול.
מעולה, אשמע עוד מעט.

notes: Sharing a song is casual and does not fit family, work, or home.

recent_messages.text: Can you remind me what the name of that restaurant was?
I think it was Neni.

notes: This is a casual question about a restaurant, not family, work, or home.
